scene.location: Urban street corner adjacent to a multi-story building
scene.environment: Paved street and parking area with a grassy park
scene.key_elements: Burning vehicles, smoke, deployed fire truck

description: Urban street corner next to a multi-story brick building where an active incident is taking place. Two vehicles are heavily engulfed in flames and smoke near the sidewalk. An emergency vehicle, a fire truck, is parked diagonally in the lot to respond to the fire. In total, there are five vehicles in the immediate vicinity, including the two on fire and three others parked nearby. The scene is attended by two firefighters, while two civilians are also present in the area.
